name: Repo Workflow Bootstrap
shortDescription: Standardizes local and CI command contracts for repositories.
longDescription: Introduces deterministic build/test workflow baselines and validates required files for maintainable engineering operations.
author: ARS Platform

inputs.name: repo_layout
inputs.description: Current repository tooling and command surface.

inputs.name: required_checks
inputs.description: Quality gate expectations for merge readiness.

outputs.name: workflow_plan
outputs.description: Canonical command contract and CI flow.

outputs.name: bootstrap_patch
outputs.description: Patch to add scripts/config for workflow baseline.

includedAssets.name: scripts/verify_pipeline_files.py
includedAssets.description: Checks for expected CI and command contract files.

failureModes: Bootstrap plan misses language-specific build requirements.
CI checks diverge from local scripts over time.
Required files exist but do not enforce correct behavior.

examples.title: Legacy service CI baseline
examples.summary: Introduces canonical lint/test/build workflow and verification checks.
examples.outputPreview: Workflow plan and required file checklist

changelog.summary: Initial release for repository workflow bootstrap.
